message:
fix: guard against edge cases in WebGL dotplot and non-B DNA detection

webgl-dotplot.ts:
- Guard shader against division by zero when threshold = 1.0
- Handle empty sequence in encodeSequenceToTexture (return 1x1 texture)

non-b-dna.ts:
- Guard detectG4 and detectZDNA against invalid windowSize (< 1)
- Guard against sequence shorter than window size

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
